result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 8:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM base_cases bc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = bc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT bc.owner_id AS agent_id, bc.case_id
    FROM base_cases bc
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.oldvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 1
), agent_handle_time AS (
  SELECT nt.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
  GROUP BY nt.owner_id
)
SELECT aht.agent_id
FROM agent_handle_time aht
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = aht.agent_id
ORDER BY aht.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM base_cases bc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = bc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT bc.owner_id AS agent_id, bc.case_id
    FROM base_cases bc
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.oldvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 1
), agent_handle_time AS (
  SELECT nt.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
  GROUP BY nt.owner_id
)
SELECT aht.agent_id
FROM agent_handle_time aht
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = aht.agent_id
ORDER BY aht.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM base_cases bc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = bc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT bc.owner_id AS agent_id, bc.case_id
    FROM base_cases bc
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.oldvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 1
), agent_handle_time AS (
  SELECT nt.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
  GROUP BY nt.owner_id
)
SELECT aht.agent_id
FROM agent_handle_time aht
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = aht.agent_id
ORDER BY aht.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= ((DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')::timestamp)
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT bc.case_id, bc.owner_id, bc.created_ts, bc.closed_ts
  FROM base_cases bc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = bc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT bc.owner_id AS agent_id, bc.case_id
    FROM base_cases bc
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.oldvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 1
), agent_handle_time AS (
  SELECT nt.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closed_ts - nt.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
  GROUP BY nt.owner_id
)
SELECT aht.agent_id
FROM agent_handle_time aht
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = aht.agent_id
ORDER BY aht.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= ((DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')::timestamp)

  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,

), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_cnt

    SELECT bc.owner_id AS agent_id, bc.case_id

    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.oldvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id

    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
